title: Client-ready copied workbook cleanup with post-clean dependency verification
originSignal: A workbook needs a clean client-ready copy with formulas frozen and workbook dependencies removed without damaging the source.
riskPattern: Cleanup can accidentally run on the source workbook, leave external links or queries, or remove hidden process sheets before values are frozen.
regressionChecks: Inspect source workbook dependencies before cleanup.
Generate a cleanup plan before making destructive changes.
Run cleanup only on a copied workbook.
Verify post-clean workbook has no external links, query/model dependency, or unexpected process sheets.
expectedEvidence: Pre-clean dependency report lists links, connections, formulas, and package parts.
Cleanup plan lists actions and post-clean assertions.
Post-clean verification report proves the copied deliverable satisfies expected assertions.
boundaries: The package must not store customer deliverables or generated cleaned workbooks.
nextLiveWorkbookRequirement: Add a sanitized source workbook with formulas, one external-style link, one query-like dependency, and a copied clean-output fixture.
